title: Scones
instructions: Proof 4 tbsp yeast and 1 cup water. Add 1 tbsp sugar to water.
Roll out ½ inch thick and cut out.
Drop into hot oil to cook until puffed and golden.
Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve with butter and jam.
notes: Makes enough for 40 people (can be cut in half)
Can be used as a base for tacos/tostadas
Recipe from Mary Ann Back – her traditional Halloween night treat!
